title: How To Treat Lines Under The Eye (Not Tear Troughs) | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: How To Treat Lines Under The Eye (Not Tear Troughs) ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So the little lines underneath your eyes very common place for patients to ask for treatment [Music] some of those are pre-existing they're a bit like their creases on your hand they're not actually creases related to aging and they will always be there no matter what you do so b…

segments.text: so the little lines underneath your eyes very common place for patients to ask for treatment [Music] some of those are pre-existing they're a bit like their creases on your hand they're not actually creases related to aging and they will always be there no matter what you do so be aware of those in particular because they're not treatable they're the structure of the skin and you'll see this on children they often have lines underneath their eyes the other type of line is most often caused by the action of the zygomatic muscles when you smile so this is compression of the whole of the mid face up underneath the eyes which causes a few creases and some of those are caused by orbicularis oculi too so there is a small cohort people who can get a tiny bit of difference from very low doses of toxin in that area but it's problematic because you also get other side effects and many times the zygomatic muscle is dominant in that area anyway so you end up getting a little side effects such as a bruise or maybe the muscle pulls a bit more immediately and you get a slightly odd

dynamic effect when someone's smiling and then you still get the lines because the zygomatic muscle is the primary cause so it's very hard to treat with injectables it's not something most dermal fillers will do a lot too you can try these superficial hydrating treatments they can be helpful in certain types of lines but i'd say that further than that you know resurfacing is also tricky and in this area but it's a very tricky area to treat and i think mostly we're limit to limited to stabilizing the area tear trough treatments and skin quality treatments you

transcript: so the little lines underneath your eyes very common place for patients to ask for treatment [Music] some of those are pre-existing they're a bit like their creases on your hand they're not actually creases related to aging and they will always be there no matter what you do so be aware of those in particular because they're not treatable they're the structure of the skin and you'll see this on children they often have lines underneath their eyes the other type of line is most often caused by the action of the zygomatic muscles when you smile so this is compression of the whole of the mid face up underneath the eyes which causes a few creases and some of those are caused by orbicularis oculi too so there is a small cohort people who can get a tiny bit of difference from very low doses of toxin in that area but it's problematic because you also get other side effects and many times the zygomatic muscle is dominant in that area anyway so you end up getting a little side effects such as a bruise or maybe the muscle pulls a bit more immediately and you get a slightly odd dynamic effect when someone's smiling and then you still get the lines because the zygomatic muscle is the primary cause so it's very hard to treat with injectables it's not something most dermal fillers will do a lot too you can try these superficial hydrating treatments they can be helpful in certain types of lines but i'd say that further than that you know resurfacing is also tricky and in this area but it's a very tricky area to treat and i think mostly we're limit to limited to stabilizing the area tear trough treatments and skin quality treatments you
